title: Construction OS Session Landing Envelope
description: Defines the accepted subset of the Fabric session envelope that Construction_Application_OS will consume on landing. This schema mirrors the Fabric session envelope contract (construction_os_session_envelope.schema.json) as an external reference. No field grants Fabric authority over Construction OS internals.

initial_view.description: UI/view label for landing. No runtime stage or execution command.

observer_mode.description: Must be true. Fabric operates in observer-only mode.

branding_ref.description: Branding configuration reference. Display metadata only.

return_route.description: Fabric return route. Retained as metadata only — no redirect execution.

readiness_state.description: Fabric-side readiness assessment. Does not determine Construction OS validity.

standalone_valid.description: Must be true. Construction OS standalone validity is non-negotiable.

$comment: AUTHORITY BOUNDARY: This schema defines the accepted landing envelope subset only. No field grants Fabric authority over Construction OS kernel truth, runtime execution, atlas conditions, cognitive admission, registry topology, or application state. No identity, auth tokens, secrets, or mutable session state may be included. Construction OS remains standalone-valid and may execute independently of Fabric.
